title: GeneFun Run-Log Annotation
description: Human corrections to LLM judge grades for one run log. Written by the team submitting the PR; revised in response to senior PR comments. One .ann file per run log per PR. See docs/plan/per-pr-review-workflow.md §2.3.

run_log.description: Filename of the run log this annotation grades, relative to the same directory. Matches the run log's `<timestamp>.json` filename so the pair sorts adjacent in ls.

annotator.description: Team identifier or GitHub username of the team that authored the corrections. Plain string — no validation of the value because organizations vary in how they identify teams.

corrections.description: One entry per dimension per test in the run log. Every dimension gets an entry; `agreed` is computed as `corrected_score == llm_score` (no separate field).

test_id.description: The test this dimension belongs to. References test_id in the run log.

dimension_source.description: Where the dimension comes from. Matches the run log's `judge_dimension.source`.

dimension_name.description: The dimension name as it appears in the run log's `judge.dimensions[].name` (or `outcome_summary.aggregated_dimensions[].name`). Plain text — must match the run log exactly so the monthly review can join across files.

llm_score.description: The LLM judge's score on this dimension, mapped from the run log's enum: pass→3, partial→2, fail→1.

corrected_score.description: The team's score after review. Equal to llm_score means they agreed with the judge.

comment.description: Optional free-text rationale. Expected when corrected_score != llm_score, omitted (or null) when they agree.
